_comment: Degraded-run fixture (F-001): Get-ComplianceCase was denied - eDiscovery reads need an eDiscovery role group beyond Global Reader. ED-01 must read 'not readable this session' (Verify manually), never '0 cases (Informational)', which would present unchecked as clear.

cases.error: Running 'Get-ComplianceCase' requires membership in an eDiscovery role group.
